analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒緊繃，受中國DeepSeek事件影響，美國股市大幅下跌，科技股尤其是人工智慧基礎設施相關股價大幅下跌。Nvidia股價下跌16%，成為跌幅最大的科技股之一。同時，Netflix財報表現不佳，公司決定減少公開觀看數據報告，華爾街股價因此下跌。另外，SpaceX星艦發射取消，導致股價下跌。

【結語】
投資者應該保持冷靜，避免因恐慌情緒而做出錯誤的投資決定。應該根據公司的實際業績和未來發展方向進行評估，而不是單純地跟隨市場情緒。另外，投資者也應該注意自己的風險承受能力和投資目標，避免過度投資或過度風險。

【精選個股】
NVDA - Nvidia - 人工智慧基礎設施領導者，下跌16%的機會仍然存在。
INTU - Intuitive - 手術程序增長預測13.5%-15.5%，非GAAP毛利率68%-69%。
NEPH - Nephros, Inc. - 水安全策略的最新發展和公司未來發展方向令人期待。

items.title: Warren Buffett Just Revealed He -- Not Greg Abel -- Made Berkshire's Big Alphabet Bet. Should You Follow Him In?
items.summary: The conviction belongs to Buffett. But is the oracle of Omaha right?
items.zh_title: 沃倫巴菲特突然宣布自己而非格雷格阿卜爾負責伯克希爾在阿爾法貝塔的投資。您是否應該效仿他？
items.zh_point: 沃倫巴菲特承認自己是伯克希爾在阿爾法貝塔的投資決策人，但他的判斷是否正確？

items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Micron, Sandisk, Google Lead AI Sell-Off, Netflix Dives Late; SpaceX Starship Launch Scrubbed
items.summary: The Nasdaq tumbled on Sandisk, Micron, other AI stocks, but regional banks and transports rose. SpaceX fell late as a Starship launch was scrubbed.
items.zh_title: 道瓊未來指數：微軟、西數、谷歌領導人工智慧大跌，Netflix下半場大跌，SpaceX星艦發射取消
items.zh_point: 道瓊未來指數受人工智慧股價大幅下跌影響，西數和微軟股價大跌，谷歌股價也下跌，Netflix股價下半場大跌，SpaceX星艦發射取消，導致股價下跌。

items.title: Nebius lands $1 billion AI deal as one major risk looms
items.summary: Nebius Group’s latest $1 billion artificial intelligence contract suggests customer demand is not the company’s biggest problem. Paying to build the capacity may be. AI startup Reflection said on July 14 that it had signed a deal worth more than $1 billion to secure computing capacity from Nebius ...
items.zh_title: Nebius 獲得 1 億美元 AI 合約　但巨大風險在所難免
items.zh_point: Nebius Group 獲得 1 億美元的人工智慧合約，表明客戶需求並非公司最大問題，但支付建置能力可能會是重大風險。

items.title: TSMC Just Announced Fantastic News for Nvidia Shareholders
items.summary: TSMC manufactures Nvidia's market-leading AI chips.
items.zh_title: TSMC宣布對Nvidia股東的驚人好消息
items.zh_point: TSMC是Nvidia市場領導的AI晶片製造商，最新消息對Nvidia股東來說是一個好兆頭。

items.title: Why Union Pacific Stock Chugged Almost 4% Higher on Thursday
items.summary: It was the subject of a bullish analyst's price target raise.
items.zh_title: 為什麼聯合太平洋股價上漲近4%
items.zh_point: 聯合太平洋股價上漲原因是某位樂觀的分析師提高了股價目標。

items.title: Elon Musk's Memphis AI empire is the epicenter of the data center backlash
items.summary: Data center-related policy proposals, protests and litigation are underway across the country citing Colossus and Memphis as a cautionary tale.
items.zh_title: 馬斯克的美孚AI帝國成為資料中心反彈的焦點
items.zh_point: 美孚的資料中心引發全國性抗議和訴訟，警告他人注意。

items.title: SpaceX aborts Starship test flight, sending stock lower
items.summary: Elon Musk said it would make another attempt "hopefully in a few days."  SpaceX completed the maiden test flight of its Starship V3 rocket in May.
items.zh_title: SpaceX放棄星艦試驗飛行，股價下跌
items.zh_point: SpaceX星艦V3試驗飛行失敗，公司創辦人埃隆·穆斯克表示將在幾天內再次嘗試。

items.title: Microsoft's Nadella criticizes Anthropic's Fable for being 'editorially controlled'
items.summary: Microsoft enjoys close ties to Anthropic, but it's also working to help companies refine models that keep their data private.
items.zh_title: 微軟的納德拉批評 Anthropic 的 Fable 為「編輯控制」
items.zh_point: 微軟與 Anthropic 有密切關係，但微軟也致力於幫助公司優化私有資料的模型。

items.title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.summary: The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite fell on Thursday, weighed down by declines in chip stocks and shares of Alphabet.
items.zh_title: 週五的大宗股票新聞：下一交易日市場可能會受哪些因素影響
items.zh_point: 標準普爾500指數和納斯達克指數在週四下跌，受晶片股和Alphabet股票下跌的影響。

items.title: Banking Committee's Sen. Rounds liked Warsh's 'tone' in first testimony as Fed chairman
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh was on Capitol Hill for two days of testimony this week.
items.zh_title: 聯邦儲備委員會銀行委員會議員羅恩斯讚賞沃許的「語氣」
items.zh_point: 聯邦儲備委員會主席沃許在本週兩天的國會聽證會上表達了對美聯儲的看法。

items.title: Netflix is getting stingier about its viewing data, and Wall Street isn’t happy
items.summary: Netflix’s stock is falling in the wake of mixed earnings and a new plan to cut back on the publication of ‘What We Watched’ reports.
items.zh_title: Netflix越來越節儉地公開觀看數據，華爾街不滿
items.zh_point: Netflix最新財報表現不佳，公司決定減少公開「觀看數據報告」，華爾街股價因此下跌。

items.title: 10 U.S. metro areas where builders are slashing prices on new homes
items.summary: Existing-home prices just hit a new record high — but there are plenty of newly built homes selling at a discount, as desperate builders cut prices.
items.zh_title: 10個美國城市新建房屋建商大幅降價
items.zh_point: 美國新建房屋建商因需求下降而大幅降價，10個城市的新建房屋價格已經開始下滑。根據數據，美國已售房屋的價格創下新高，但建商仍在努力出售新建房屋，為了吸引買家，建商開始降低價格。

items.title: Palo Alto Networks’ stock has been on a tear — and it could go even higher, according to these bulls
items.summary: The company’s shares have roughly doubled over the past three months, as investors have warmed to the idea that AI is increasing the need for cybersecurity products.
items.zh_title: 帕洛阿爾托網路的股票已經大幅上漲 — 並且可能還會繼續上漲，根據這些買盤
items.zh_point: 帕洛阿爾托網路的股票在過去三個月內大約翻倍，投資者對於人工智慧增加了對安全性產品的需求感到欣賞。

items.title: As SpaceX’s stock notches first close below IPO price, the company is gearing up for a crucial launch
items.summary: The megarocket’s success is SpaceX’s “single most important watch item,” one analyst says.
items.zh_title: SpaceX 股票首度跌破 IPO 價格，公司正準備關鍵發射
items.zh_point: SpaceX 的巨型火箭發射成功是公司的「關鍵關注點」，一位分析師表示。

items.title: Americans say they need $1.2 million to retire. Most are too deep in debt to get there.
items.summary: More than 80% of Americans worry about running out of money in retirement: “It really keeps them up at night.”
items.zh_title: 美國人認為退休需要 1.2 萬美元，但大多數人欠債太多無法達成
items.zh_point: 美國超過 80% 的人擔心退休後會缺錢，「這真的會讓他們失眠」。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，科技股尤其是人工智慧基礎設施相關股價大幅下跌，Nvidia股價下跌16%，成為跌幅最大的科技股之一。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約黃金、白銀結束交易下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約黃金和白銀昨天結束交易下跌，黃金跌幅達1.4%，白銀跌幅達2.5%，黃金連續下跌兩天，白銀連續下跌三天。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，且不使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋找不會讓美國AI巨頭沉沒
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價大幅下跌，恐慌情緒可能過於誇大。
